title: Fog Remover
body:
## **Disables atmospheric and distant fog for better visibility**
| Client             | Supported |
|--------------------|-----------|
| Vanilla Minecraft  |✅Just apply resource pack |
| Sodium             |💡Use the [Sodium Extra](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium-extra) mod to control fog |

| Dimension   | Removes Fog |
|------------|-------------|
| Overworld  | ✅           |
| Nether     | ✅           |
| The End    | ✅           |

![overworld](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fec8f92bdd0e4bd26a31ccb0fdfa8a8bb00af0d9.png)
![nether](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d72355d0a75d2abefeb7a387f69a9aab2b1172b8.png)
